auc_contract.justification: runner records exact full-vocabulary competition ranks
auc_contract.normalization: exact area under the pass-threshold step function divided by log(vocabulary_size)
auc_contract.x_axis: natural log rank threshold from 1 through vocabulary size

numerical_eligibility.interpretation: Descriptive method comparison remains paired on identical residuals; imperfect final-output parity limits causal claims.
Descriptive method comparison remains paired on identical residuals; imperfect final-output parity limits causal claims.

upstream.metric: pass@k = item-macro mean fraction of intermediates with min-over-band/form exact rank <= k
